title: TREATMENT SERVICES - 211info
text: NEXT DOOR TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides therapeutic support to children, teens, and their families. Services include counseling, therapeutic day treatment schooling programs, and in-home supportive services. Offers therapeutic Foster Care for forster children and teens who have emotional, behavioral, and/or medical needs. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Youth involved in the child welfare or juvenile justice systems Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 436-0333 345 -. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 386-6665 Main phone Main phone (541) 436-0333 ext 345 [email protected] FAX (541) 386-3071 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred FEES: Call for information DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco Counties Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child/Adolescent Residential Treatment Facilities Foster Home Placement Mental Health Evaluation * Adolescents Placements for Children and Youth Psychiatric Day Treatment * Adolescents Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - HEALTH PROMOTION AND CHRONIC DISEASE PREVENTION EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - SUMMER CAMPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - GORGE YOUTH MENTORING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTH PROMOTION SERVICES/NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SANA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MID-COLUMBIA HEALTH EQUITY ADVOCATES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COLUMBIA GORGE PRIDE ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEXT DOOR
